name: Phaalse Ka Sharbat (Blackberry Downpour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 10 minutes plus overnight soaking and 30 minutes chilling.
2. Soak the blackberries in the measured water overnight.
3. Mash the blackberries into the water, then strain the mixture through a sieve.
4. Add sugar and salt to the strained liquid and mix thoroughly.
5. Refrigerate the mixture for about 30 minutes.
6. Serve in tall glasses, topped with crushed ice and garnished with pineapple slices.
